name: Sweet Potato Pie#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the sweet potatoes until tender.
2. Peel and mash the potatoes.
3. Beat together the mashed potatoes, melted butter, and salt in a large bowl.
4. Add sugar, evaporated milk, cinnamon, and vanilla extract to the mixture. Mix well after each addition.
5. Pour the batter into prepared pie crusts.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until firm.
7. Serve with whipped cream or Cool-Whip.
